hero.title: Sculpting Style, Cultivating Confidence
hero.subtext: Step into Aura, Seattle's premier chic industrial hair studio. We master modern, low-maintenance cuts and lived-in color, meticulously crafted to amplify your unique flow and natural beauty.

nicheCopy.aboutHeading: The Intersection of Form and Light
nicheCopy.aboutBody: Located in Capitol Hill, Aura is a space designed for collaboration and precision craft. We celebrate natural texture and architectural detail.
nicheCopy.serviceIntro: A curated range of hair styling and color maintenance options.

testimonials.name: Alex Chen
testimonials.text: Best fade I've had in Seattle, hands down.

customFeatures: 30 mins booking slots with email confirmation
